# Transcrição: 3. Get Focused - Eye On The Prize

- **Fonte:** 3. Get Focused - Eye On The Prize
- **Duração:** 02:24
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:24]

Hey, get focused on the prize. It's not about a phone call. It's about the prize. What is the prize? You know, I see so many people and I know for myself as a young salesperson, even as an experienced and a professional salesperson, I lost focus on the prize. I found myself just going to work, just driving to work, just making calls, just doing follow-up, just saying, What is the prize? What is the prize? I don't want to just play the hand. I want to win. What's the prize? I don't know what your prize is. Is it the award? Is it money? Is it esteem? Is it best in the industry? Is it to be on a newspaper? I don't know what your prize is. What is your prize? Look, if I don't know and you don't know, nobody's going to get the prize. So I'll tell you as a young salesperson, okay? And even as a salesperson who was experienced, when I forgot what the prize was, my production went down. My production went down and my results went down. But when I woke up in the morning, I remember being 26 years old, waking up, I needed new shoes. And I didn't want to spend the money on the shoes because when I got money and what I did was I put it off into these sacred accounts so I was broke all the time. And I wanted some new shoes and I'm like, I'm not touching that account because that account is sacred. That was a prize. But I need some new shoes, right? And I'm like, who is going to pay by my shoes today? Who's going to buy my jacket, my tie, my shirt? Who's going to pay for my haircut, my car, my boat? Whatever it is you want. I got Christmas coming, man. Who's going to pay for Santa? Because I don't want to do it. I want to go get new money. So that was one of my prizes. Every day I'd wake up, what do I want today? What do I need today? What does my household need today? Who's got my money? Okay? Who can I call today that has qualified, that is qualified, that needs my product, that can buy my prize? So this is what I want you to do right now. I want you to write down, what are your prizes? Ladies and gentlemen, what are your prizes? What do you want? Why did you go to work today? What is it you're trying to get your hands on? I know this. When I focus on the prize, I get this look in my eye. I get this look in my eye like, dude, I know, people can feel it. They're like, ooh, this guy's all in my stuff. Okay? My attitude changes. My posture changes. I know why I'm there. I know why I can persist in a deal because I got my eye on the prize. How do you do that? Wake up every day? What is it you want today? What's your to-do list? What do you want to accomplish today? What is the prize? Not just what is the call?
